metadata.description: Curated example skills for getting started with Azure SRE Agent. Fork and customise for your environment.

plugins.name: vm-sre-skills
plugins.description: 10 example skills for diagnosing and remediating Azure Virtual Machine issues (Linux + Windows).
examples: Investigate why vm-app-001 is slow or unhealthy
Find critical VM issues across rg-prod and rg-backend
Explain the top infrastructure bottleneck affecting vm-prod-web-01
Report recommended remediation steps for vm-db-01
